description: SaaS multi-tenancy provisioning pipeline with SETNX idempotency guard, synchronous bulk-seed, and atomic tenant bootstrap. T605 TenantProvisioningOrchestrator acquires provision lock at ORDER 1, seeds FREEDOM defaults synchronously, stores tenant record, then emits TenantProvisioned.

n1.label: ValidateProvisionRequest
n1.description: Validate tenant creation request fields, check tenantId from ALS, and verify no duplicate tenantId exists

n2.label: RetrieveProvisioningPatterns
n2.description: RAG retrieval of atomic tenant bootstrap patterns: SETNX idempotency, synchronous bulk-seed, provision lock lifecycle

n3.label: DecomposeProvisionPlan
n3.description: Decompose provisioning into ordered steps: lock acquisition → FREEDOM seed → tenant record → event emission

n4.label: GenerateProvisioningOrchestrator
n4.description: AI generates T605 TenantProvisioningOrchestrator with correct order: SETNX at ORDER 1 via IProvisionLockService (F1521), synchronous bulkSeed via ITenantSeedService (F1520), storeDocument(tenantRecord) via ITenantRegistryService (F1519) BEFORE enqueue(TenantProvisioned). TenantProvisioningFailed emitted on any error. tenantId from ALS only. Content: SETNX_IDEMPOTENCY + ATOMIC_PROVISION_SEQUENCE + PROVISIONING_STATUS_MARKER machine components enforced.

n5.label: ValidateProvisionOrchestrator
n5.description: Validate SETNX at ORDER 1, bulkSeed synchronous (no Promise.all/allSettled), storeDocument before enqueue, TenantProvisioningFailed on all error paths, tenantId from ALS only

n6.label: ScoreProvisionOrchestrator
n6.description: Score implementation: SETNX order compliance, bulkSeed synchronicity, DNA-8 outbox order, error event coverage, ALS tenant isolation

n8.label: StoreFeedback
n8.description: DPO triple: chosen=SETNX-order1 + bulkSeed-synchronous + storeDocument-before-enqueue + TenantProvisioningFailed-on-all-errors + tenantId-from-ALS, rejected=SETNX-missing OR bulkSeed-async-scatter OR enqueue-before-store OR tenantId-from-payload. Record model used, score, SETNX compliance flag, DNA-8 compliance flag, ALS isolation flag.
n8.discriminatingConstraint: Missing SETNX at ORDER 1 OR async bulkSeed scatter OR enqueue before storeDocument OR tenantId from payload receives score=0 and triggers n3 re-iteration. Correct implementation: SETNX via F1521 at ORDER 1, synchronous bulkSeed via F1520, storeDocument via F1519 before TenantProvisioned enqueue, tenantId from AsyncLocalStorage.
